label: Strategy Harness Runs
description: Inspect a rolling live root and identify active, blocked, completed, or post-live strategy harness rounds.

inputs.name: rolling-live-root
inputs.description: Root directory that contains rolling strategy live rounds.

outputs.name: runs_snapshot
outputs.description: Current rolling-run state, blocked supervisor state, and pre-launch refresh commands.

failureModes.description: The rolling live root does not exist or is unreadable.
A prior supervisor is still active or in post-live work; do not launch another live round.

evidencePolicy: Use this before launching or extending live work.
A stale runs snapshot cannot authorize a fresh launch.
Blocked supervisor state creates an infrastructure or Live Ops task, not a strategy-quality conclusion.
notes: This tool answers whether the harness is schedulable before strategy agents request live sampling.
